Men's Basketball Roster Schedule Stats Coaches News Archives History Donate Here Tickets

2025-2026 Men's Basketball Roster

12 Michael Oyekanmi

  • Height 6-5
  • Weight 200
  • Class Redshirt Junior
  • Hometown Staten Island, NY
  • Highschool Curtis High School
  • Bio
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

2022-23
  • Prior to injury, he appeared in eight games
  • Averaged 6.4 ppg, 2.9 reb/g, and 0.3 ast/g
  • Recorded a career high of 15 points at Saint Michael's (11/22), shooting 7-11 (.636) from the field
  • Grabbed a career high of 8 rebounds versus Mercy (11/30)
2023-24
  • Played in 29 games, making two starts
  • Averaged 2.6 ppg, 2.0 reb/g, and 0.2 ast/g
  • Tallied a season high of 10 points versus Jefferson (11/18)
2024-25
  • Only appeared in two games this season before injury
2025-26:
  • Appeared in seven games in the season
  • Averaged 1.3 ppg in 4.9 minutes per game

Statistics

Season:
2025-2026
  • 2022-2023
  • 2023-2024
  • 2024-2025
  • 2025-2026
